texto: When I was young I wanted to be just like him.One of the charm, of a bright orange smileand muscular laughter.Bold brown eyes flashing fearlesswhen he sat not alone on cold blue nights in empty boxcars.Riding a freight train'ssolitary wailaway from NebraskaDepression, accompanying dreamswithered farms.Nothing left but the leaves of possibilities.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Larsen Bowker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de enfrentar incertezas com ação. O trecho “When I was young I wanted to be just like him.One of the charm, of a bright orange smileand muscu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, chance, great-depression pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
